data.title: SkyBridge cuts crypto holdings as Bitcoin drops 30% and regulation stalls
data.description:
SkyBridge Capital shifted from 65% crypto to 69% macro trading between March and September 2025 due to market volatility under Trump.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/skybridge-crypto-holdings-bitcoin-drops/

data.title: Cake Wallet adds Zcash support, expands privacy features
data.description:
Cake Wallet has added Zcash with shielded transactions enabled by default, expanding its privacy tools beyond Monero as interest in blockchain privacy grows.
source: https://catenaa.com/markets/cryptocurrencies/cake-wallet-adds-zcash-support-expands-privacy-features/

data.title: Hong Kong to Launch Stablecoin Licensing Regime in 2026, Financial Chief Says
data.description:
Financial Secretary announces regulatory progress at Davos as city positions for tokenized asset growth
source: https://www.blockhead.co/2026/01/21/hong-kong-to-launch-stablecoin-licensing-regime-in-2026-financial-chief-says/

data.title: Sei Development Fund Partners with Bhutan's Sovereign Fund for Network Node Deployment
data.description: Sei Development Fund has announced a collaboration with Bhutan's sovereign fund, Druk Holding and Investments (DHI), to deploy and operate validation nodes on the Sei network. According to Foresight News, the initiative is led by DHI's innovation and technology department and is expected to launch in the first quarter of 2026. Following this deployment, Bhutan and the Sei Development Fund plan to explore asset tokenization and new economic initiatives.

data.title: Hong Kong Plans First Stablecoin Issuer Licences in Q1 Amid Crypto Push
data.description:
Hong Kong is preparing to issue its first batch of stablecoin issuer licences in the first quarter of the year, stepping up efforts to position itself as a regional hub.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/hong-kong-plans-first-stablecoin-issuer-licences-in-q1-amid-crypto-push/

data.title: Zcash Foundation Enhances Network with Rust-Based DNS Seeder
data.description: The Zcash Foundation has introduced a new DNS seeder developed using Rust to enhance the speed and security of peer discovery for Zcash nodes. According to NS3.AI, this improvement facilitates nodes in locating and connecting with other peers more effectively upon joining the network, thereby increasing overall reliability. The upgrade is designed to fortify the decentralized network infrastructure, ensuring better performance.

data.title: Delaware Life Becomes First U.S. Insurer to Add Bitcoin to Retirement Annuities
data.description:
Delaware Life Insurance Company has taken a landmark step in the convergence of traditional finance and digital assets by becoming the first U. S. insurance carrier to integrate cryptocurrency exposure into retirement annuities. The firm has added the BlackRock U
source: https://www.ethnews.com/delaware-life-becomes-first-u-s-insurer-to-add-bitcoin-to-retirement-annuities/

data.title: eToro Lists NIGHT, Bringing Cardano’s Privacy Chain to the Mainstream
data.description:
eToro has officially listed NIGHT, the native token of Midnight, marking a major visibility milestone for the Cardano-linked privacy network. The move significantly broadens access to NIGHT, exposing the asset to eToro’s roughly 35 million users and shifting Midnight from a largely technical project into a widely tradable token within a mainstream trading environment.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/etoro-lists-night-bringing-cardanos-privacy-chain-to-the-mainstream/

data.title: The former CEO of Alameda Research was released from prison and federal supervision today.
data.description: Former Alameda Research CEO Caroline Ellison is expected to be released on January 21, 2026, after completing her federal supervision. Information indicates she has already been transferred from federal prison to community supervision. Under the terms of her sentence, Ellison will be subject to several restrictions after serving her sentence, including a 10-year ban on holding executive positions at publicly traded companies or cryptocurrency exchanges.

data.title: Ripple’s Monica Long expects 50% of Fortune 500 companies to adopt DATs
data.description:
Long has predicted that half of all Fortune 500 companies' corporate balance sheets will hold digital assets by the end of 2026.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/ripples-monica-long-fortune-500-adopt-dats/

data.title: Bitcoin Enters Delaware Life Insurance Investment Products
data.description:
The new offering adds the BlackRock U. S.
source: https://coindoo.com/bitcoin-enters-delaware-life-insurance-investment-products/

data.title: Guangju Energy Subsidiary Not Involved in Blockchain or Aerospace Activities
data.description: Guangju Energy announced on January 21 that its wholly-owned subsidiary, Aerospace Ouhua, is not engaged in aerospace, data chain, or blockchain-related businesses. According to Foresight News, the company made this statement on an interactive platform, clarifying the scope of its subsidiary's operations.

data.title: Blockchain Initiative Launches to Support Children's Health and Charity
data.description:
A new charity project, 'Voice for Love,' has been launched on the BSC blockchain to support the Beijing Yanran Angel Children's Hospital. According to ChainCatcher, the initiative aims to raise awareness about children's healthcare and charitable assistance, encouraging more societal involvement in these areas. The hospital has been dedicated to providing medical treatment and aid to children, bringing hope and warmth to numerous families.

The project promotes participation in charity through blockchain technology, ensuring transparency and traceability of donations. Daily slippage earnings from the initiative will be directed to the hospital, allowing industry philanthropists to spread warmth through their actions, making love visible and hope enduring.

null
source: https://x.com/reutersbiz/status/2013873006519468474

data.title: CFTC Chairman Unveils “Future Proof” to Reset Crypto Market Regulation
data.description:
Commodity Futures Trading Commission Chairman Mike Selig has formally introduced the “Future Proof” initiative, a broad program designed to modernize the agency’s regulatory framework for digital assets, prediction markets, and artificial intelligence in finance.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/cftc-chairman-unveils-future-proof-to-reset-crypto-market-regulation/

data.title: Galaxy to launch $100M hedge fund to bet on rising and falling crypto prices
data.description:
Galaxy plans to deploy a new hedge fund strategy that targets both crypto tokens and traditional financial stocks as the “up-only” phase fades.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/galaxy-launches-100m-crypto-hedge-fund-long-short-strategy?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Binance Alpha: ETHGas (GWEI) will be listed on January 21st at 12:00 PM. Holders of 230 points can claim an airdrop.
data.description: Binance Alpha has announced that it will be the first platform to list ETHGas (GWEI), with Alpha trading commencing on January 21, 2026 at 12:00 UTC. Eligible users can claim the airdrop using Binance Alpha Points on the Alpha event page after trading begins. Users holding at least 230 Binance Alpha Points can claim 2,400 GWEI tokens on a first-come, first-served basis; if the reward pool is not fully allocated, the points threshold will automatically decrease by 5 points every 5 minutes. Binance Alpha reminds users that claiming the airdrop will consume 15 Binance Alpha Points, and users must confirm on the Alpha event page within 24 hours, otherwise they will be deemed to have forfeited their eligibility.

data.title: Netflix's Q4 Earnings Surpass Expectations Amid Market Concerns
data.description: Netflix reported robust fourth-quarter earnings, achieving a net income of $2.42 billion and reaching 325 million global subscribers. According to NS3.AI, the company exceeded revenue forecasts, driven by subscription growth and increased advertising revenue. Despite these achievements, Netflix's stock declined by over 4% in after-hours trading. Investors are worried about escalating content costs and growing competition from traditional networks and social media platforms. Additionally, Netflix announced a $72 billion all-cash proposal to acquire Warner Bros. Discovery assets, which, along with regulatory uncertainties, contributes to market unease.

data.title: Terraform Labs Initiates Repayment Process for Terra-Luna Collapse Losses
data.description: Kroll Restructuring, acting as the bankruptcy trustee for Terraform Labs, has begun informing claimants about the repayment process related to the Terra-Luna ecosystem collapse in May 2022. According to NS3.AI, the notification details the distribution and recovery procedures, including the methods and schedules for submitting future claims. This development comes after Terraform Labs launched a dedicated claims website approximately 10 months ago to assist individuals in filing loss claims.

data.title: Google.org Invests in AI Training for Artists Through Sundance Institute
data.description: Google.org is committing $2 million to the Sundance Institute to educate over 100,000 artists in essential AI skills as part of the newly formed AI Literacy Alliance. According to NS3.AI, this initiative seeks to establish AI as a fundamental creative skill for independent filmmakers amid ongoing debates in the entertainment industry regarding AI consent, misuse, and creative control. At the same time, actors and creators are advocating for enforceable regulations to manage AI usage, highlighting the intricate balance between AI advancement and the protection of intellectual property.
